name: Assistant Context Router
description: Project-centric command and prompt-context plugin for OpenClaw

routerConfigPath.description: Optional absolute path to a YAML router manifest

runtimeBindingsPath.description: Optional absolute path to a YAML runtime bindings manifest for canonical main-session resolution; defaults to <dataDir>/runtime-bindings.yaml when omitted

feishuConfigPath.description: Optional absolute path to a YAML Feishu adapter config manifest for work-surface and future delivery bindings; defaults to <dataDir>/feishu-adapter.yaml when omitted

workflowBindingsPath.description: Optional absolute path to a YAML workflow surface bindings manifest for dispatch/review default targets; defaults to <dataDir>/workflow-bindings.yaml when omitted
